name: Ham Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk to form a soft dough.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface.
5. Knead briefly.
6. Pat into an even layer about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cut with a floured cutter.
8. Place half of the biscuits in a well-oiled pan, brushing with melted butter.
9. Arrange the ham (with mustard) on each biscuit.
10. Top with remaining biscuits and brush with milk.
11. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 12 minutes.
12. Serve hot. A small piece of bacon can be used instead of ham in each biscuit.
